name: soc2-sox-enterprise-private-compliance-platform
description: Synthetic security program operations dashboard for compliance readiness, vendor risk, identity/access workflows, evidence collection, and operational resilience.

scripts.lint: npm run claim-safety && node --check src/frameworks.js && node --check src/soxItgcControls.js && node --check src/dashboardData.js && node --check src/securityProgramData.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check scripts/dev-server.js && node --check scripts/build-check.js && node --check scripts/claim-safety-scan.js && node --check tests/sox-itgc-readiness.test.js
scripts.typecheck: node --check src/frameworks.js && node --check src/soxItgcControls.js && node --check src/dashboardData.js && node --check src/securityProgramData.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check scripts/dev-server.js && node --check scripts/build-check.js && node --check scripts/claim-safety-scan.js
